creator: gjohnson@srrc.ars.usda.gov
text:
Update the biology/tinker port.  The following changes have been
        made:

[1] Update my e-mail address.

[2] The author updated the distfile.  There is no version number in
    distfile name so update PORTREVISION.

[3] Remove the cruft for building on older FreeBSD systems as I have no
    way of knowing if this port still compiles and/or runs on systems
    with older versions of FreeBSD.

Fix: Apply the following patch to biology/tinker:
